attributes.name: [HAProxy OTel] Connection retries or redispatches spike

esqlQuery.esql:
TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
// Retries and redispatches — backend instability signals
| WHERE haproxy.connections.retries IS NOT NULL OR haproxy.requests.redispatched IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    retry_inc = SUM(INCREASE(haproxy.connections.retries)),
    redis_inc = SUM(INCREASE(haproxy.requests.redispatched))
  BY haproxy.proxy_name, haproxy.service_name, haproxy.addr
| EVAL retry_inc = COALESCE(retry_inc, 0), redis_inc = COALESCE(redis_inc, 0)
| EVAL total_instability = retry_inc + redis_inc
| WHERE total_instability > 5
| EVAL alert_key = CONCAT(TO_STRING(haproxy.proxy_name), "::", TO_STRING(haproxy.service_name), "::", COALESCE(TO_STRING(haproxy.addr), ""))
| SORT total_instability DESC
| LIMIT 50
